data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of a specific AI agent note, which is stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of this note being present or validated in the system. The absence of this specific note indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, leading to a failed validation.
gaps: AI agent note 'Tends to book last minute, send reminder 24h early' is not present.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
